pkgmetadata.longdescription: daiquiri -- Python logging setup helper.. image httpsimg.shields.iopypivdaiquiri.svg target httpspypi.python.orgpypidaiquiri alt Latest VersionThe daiquiri library provides an easy way to configure logging. It alsoprovides some custom formatters and handlers.You can read the whole documentation at httpdaiquiri.readthedocs.io Free software Apache license Source httpsgithub.comMergifyiodaiquiri
